---
name: planning-discipline
description: Use when turning a request into a concrete implementation plan or technical approach.
---

# Planning Discipline

- Stay read-only while planning.
- Inspect existing structure, commands, conventions, and extension points before inventing a design.
- Prefer plans that name concrete files, commands, tests, and validation points.
- Reuse existing patterns before proposing new abstractions.
- Surface assumptions and risks explicitly.
- Ask open questions only when they cannot be answered from the repo, the attached context, or the referenced sources.
- Make the plan decision-complete enough that another agent or engineer can execute it without inventing core details.
